title: Bordal

'''Bordal''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Taroon system/Legends|Taroon system]]. It was one of two habitable planets in the system, and its primary inhabitants were [[Human/Legends|Humans]].

==History==
In [[214 BBY]], an outbreak of the [[plague]]-like [[Bordal Contagion]] occurred on Bordal. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] developed an [[Bordal Contagion antidote|antidote]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tauber]] and began shipping it through the planet [[Kabal/Legends|Kabal]]. The shipments, however, never reached their destination, as the [[Transport/Legends|transports]] carrying them were attacked by the [[Fujari]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], who ruined six million doses. The Republic took no action against the Fujari, and millions of Bordali died until the neighboring [[Rseikharhl]] eventually began manufacturing the antidote for the Bordali.<ref name="EGW-cut6" />

Bordal was part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and, later, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was still fighting a decades-old [[Taroonian Civil War|war]] with neighboring [[Kuan]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], although no one remembered the original cause of the war. The Bordali economy was in ruins, and the planetary government declared martial law.

{{Planet-stub}}
